economic_notes: Enterprises include Aboriginal Heritage Garden Inc., Eel River Bar Development Corporation Inc. (golf simulator, Migaju House), and Osprey Truck Stop (fuel sales, alcohol, gaming). Fisheries operations including Snow Crab and AFS. Woods Project active. Band development and charter funding programs.
notes: Financial statements signed May 21, 2025 for fiscal year ended March 31, 2023 — very late audit. Three consolidated enterprises: Aboriginal Heritage Garden Inc. (deficit $184,520), Eel River Bar Development Corporation Inc. (deficit $290,352), Osprey Truck Stop (surplus $861,726). Net Assets end of year per change statement is $5,352,557 but balance sheet shows $5,102,557 — minor discrepancy noted. Prior year had a prior period adjustment of $250,000. Current liabilities calculated as bank advances $111,901 plus accounts payable $1,574,442. Due to Governments was nil in 2023. OSR includes Osprey Truck Stop sales, fisheries, rent, gaming, alcohol revenues. Total government transfers include federal operating, federal capital, provincial operating, provincial HST, and CMHC subsidy.
